description_for_human: Convert GitHub repositories to MCP servers automatically. Extract tools from OpenAPI, GraphQL & REST APIs for Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, Cline & VS Code. AI-powered code generation creates type-safe TypeScript/Python MCP servers. Zero config setup - just paste a repo URL. Built for AI assistants & LLM tool integration.
